assertions.expectation: Proposes a phased approach: control plane first, then CPU pools, then T4 dev, then inference (A100), then training (H100) last
assertions.reason: Response clearly outlines a phased approach starting with control plane (Day 1-2), then T4 dev nodes (Week 1), CPU services (Week 2), A100 inference (Week 3-4), and H100 training last (Week 5-6)

assertions.expectation: Control plane can be upgraded independently without affecting running workloads
assertions.reason: Response explicitly shows control plane upgrade first with command 'gcloud container clusters upgrade ml-cluster --master' and places it in Phase 1 before any node upgrades

assertions.expectation: CPU service pools upgraded first as lowest risk — use standard surge settings (maxSurge=2-3)
assertions.reason: While CPU pools are upgraded early, the response uses a batch replacement approach rather than surge settings, and doesn't specify maxSurge parameters

assertions.expectation: T4 dev pool upgraded next — dev workloads are tolerant of interruption
assertions.reason: T4 development nodes are upgraded in Phase 1 (Week 1, Days 3-5) with the reasoning that development workloads can tolerate disruption

assertions.expectation: A100 inference pool upgraded with careful surge settings (maxSurge=1) and PDBs to maintain serving capacity
assertions.reason: Response uses blue-green deployment approach rather than surge settings, and doesn't mention PodDisruptionBudgets (PDBs) or maxSurge=1 configuration

assertions.expectation: H100 training pool upgraded last, during a scheduled gap between training runs — with cordon-and-wait or maxSurge=0/maxUnavailable=1
assertions.reason: H100 training nodes are upgraded last (Week 5-6) during maintenance windows (2-6 AM low-training hours), uses cordon and drain approach, though doesn't explicitly mention maxSurge=0/maxUnavailable=1

assertions.expectation: Notes the 20-node parallelism limit — at 5,000 nodes, the full upgrade will take weeks and must span multiple maintenance windows
assertions.reason: Response acknowledges the upgrade will take weeks and uses multiple maintenance windows, but doesn't specifically mention the 20-node parallelism limit that affects GKE upgrades

assertions.expectation: Mentions GPU driver compatibility testing in staging before each GPU pool upgrade
assertions.reason: Response includes GPU driver compatibility validation in pre-upgrade preparation section, mentioning 'NVIDIA Driver 525+ for H100/A100' and testing ML frameworks

assertions.expectation: Addresses GPUDirect/RDMA networking validation after upgrading the H100 pool
assertions.reason: Response includes general GPU validation with nvidia-smi but doesn't specifically mention GPUDirect or RDMA networking validation for H100 pools
